name: mixed_steady
_dataset_notes: national_medium scale — 1,000 students, 6 cold weeks (rolled up) + 2 hot.
Reader queries hit the realistic mixed regime: dashboard reads only from
rollups (optimization C), analytics/turn_insights query the hot weeks.
_nfr: Closes NFR-3 and NFR-4 from docs/decisions/thesis-benchmark-plan.md §3.
_traffic_notes: Steady mixed-traffic regime: NFR-1 ingest rate (11 RPS) plus four reader
classes at 1 req/s each for 10 min. Mirrors a class-in-session window
where students play while a teacher refreshes the dashboard.
NFR-3 — dashboard p95 < 3000 ms across the window,
NFR-3 — zero dropped iterations on any read class,
NFR-4 — post-traffic compaction of week 7 completes in < 60 s,
NFR-4 — no dropped read iterations during traffic.
Compaction is triggered AFTER the traffic window by
evaluated independently from the compaction-duration pass.
Week 7 is the older of the two hot weeks (weeks=8, hot_weeks=2 -> hot
weeks are 7 and 8). The week_start is resolved from dataset_report.weeks
